title: The Fake Chat
description: A psychological horror mod that introduces eerie anomalies, fake system messages, and the haunting presence of Null to your world.
body:
"You think you're alone in your world? Think again."

The Fake Chat is a psychological horror mod designed to bring back the atmosphere of classic Minecraft creepypastas like Null and Entity303. It doesn't just add a monster; it infects your game with anomalies, glitches, and a sense of constant dread.

👻 Features in Beta 1.0.0:
Ghost in the Chat: Receive mysterious messages from "Null", fake join/leave notifications, and see the chat mimic your own words.

Reality Glitches: Signs will change their text to warning messages when you least expect it.

Haunting Presence: Experience random blindness, hear eerie sounds (chests opening, distant screams), and see flashes of the "NULL" entity.

The Punishment: Spamming the name "Null" in chat will trigger a sequence that might lead you to His world... or crash your game with a fatal error.

Multiplayer Pranks: Fully compatible with Radmin LAN. Perfect for scaring your friends during a late-night session.

🛠 Technical Info:
Platform: Forge

Versions: 1.20.1 - 1.20.6

Environment: Required on both Client and Server for the full experience.

Maybe the projects will be abandoned (LOL of course it’s a joke, I’m just busy).
There probably won't be any updates for a month, although that's not certain.

It wasn't a joke... Well, okay, maybe I'll make a new mod soon.
